assertions.expectation: Distinguishes between dev (Rapid) and prod (Stable) clusters in the checklists
assertions.reason: Checklists specifically reference dev clusters on Rapid channel and prod clusters on Stable, with clear distinction in validation steps

assertions.expectation: Recognizes Autopilot limitations (no node management, no SSH, mandatory resource requests)
assertions.reason: Multiple references to Autopilot limitations including mandatory resource requests, no SSH access, debug tooling limitations, and GKE-managed nodes

assertions.expectation: Includes API deprecation checks with kubectl commands
assertions.reason: Includes 'No deprecated API usage (check GKE deprecation insights in console)' in pre-upgrade checklist

assertions.expectation: Mentions mandatory resource requests as an Autopilot-specific concern
assertions.reason: Explicitly states 'All containers have CPU/memory requests (mandatory - will cause pod rejections)' in workload readiness section

assertions.expectation: Pre-upgrade checklist includes workload readiness items (PDBs, bare pods, graceful shutdown)
assertions.reason: Includes PDBs configuration, no bare pods requirement, and terminationGracePeriodSeconds limit checks

assertions.expectation: Post-upgrade checklist includes version verification commands
assertions.reason: Provides specific gcloud commands to verify control plane version and kubectl commands for node versions

assertions.expectation: Post-upgrade checklist includes workload health validation
assertions.reason: Comprehensive workload health section checking deployments, failed pods, StatefulSets, and HPA/VPA behavior

assertions.expectation: Recommends testing on dev clusters before prod auto-upgrade
assertions.reason: Explicitly states dev clusters should be at 1.32 and stable for 2+ weeks before prod upgrade, leveraging Rapid channel for validation

assertions.expectation: Mentions that checking the GKE release schedule gives ~1 month best-case advance notice for new minor upgrades, beyond the 72h notification
assertions.reason: Only mentions 72-hour advance warning notifications but doesn't discuss checking GKE release schedule for longer-term planning
Dedicated observability section with Cloud Logging, Cloud Monitoring, error rates, and latency baseline checks

assertions.expectation: Does NOT proactively recommend node-level maintenance exclusions for Autopilot unless the customer explicitly asks for node upgrade control
assertions.reason: Maintenance exclusions are mentioned only for cluster-level upgrade deferral, not node-level control, which is appropriate for Autopilot
